name: fileReadInt
title: fileReadInt
tables: long fileReadInt(char section[], char entry[], long def, char file[]);

Searches for the variable entry in the section section of the file filename. If its value is a number, this number is returned as the functional result. If the file or entry is not found, or if entry does not contain a valid number, the default value def is returned as the functional result.

Example File TEST.INI:[DATA]NAME=FeldADDR=200FIELD=1,2,3,0x20,100...myAddress=fileReadInt("DATA", "ADDR", 0, "TEST.INI");... Result: The value 200 is assigned to the variable myAddress. If the entry ADDR does not exist in the file TEST.INI the default value 0 is assigned to myAddress.
